# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - deploy
  - release_notes

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  MR_META_FILE: ".mr_meta.env"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

prepare:mr_meta:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:3.20
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq sed
    - |
      MR_IID="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}"
      if [ -z "$MR_IID" ]; then
        echo "No MR context (CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID empty)." >&2
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --show-error --fail \
        --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}")"
    - |
      MR_TITLE_RAW="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // ""')"
      MR_DESC_RAW="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // ""')"
      MR_WEB_URL="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.web_url // ""')"
      MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.source_branch // ""')"
      MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.target_branch // ""')"
    - |
      normalize() {
        echo "$1" \
          | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' \
          | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+//; s/-+$//; s/-+/-/g' \
          | cut -c1-50
      }
    - MR_TITLE_SLUG="$(normalize "$MR_TITLE_RAW")"
    - |
      {
        echo "MR_IID=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
        echo "MR_TITLE=$(printf %s "$MR_TITLE_RAW" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g')"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION=$(printf %s "$MR_DESC_RAW" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g')"
        echo "MR_TITLE_SLUG=${MR_TITLE_SLUG}"
        echo "MR_WEB_URL=${MR_WEB_URL}"
        echo "MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH}"
        echo "MR_TARGET_BRANCH=${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}"
      } > "${MR_META_FILE}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: ".mr_meta.env"
    expire_in: 1 day

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_meta
      optional: true
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - |
      MR_TITLE="${MR_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-}}"
      MR_DESCRIPTION="${MR_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      echo "Build notification payload:"
      echo "  project=${CI_PROJECT_PATH}"
      echo "  ref=${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
      echo "  sha=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
      echo "  mr_title=${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "  mr_description=${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
      echo "  pipeline=${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
    - |
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.local"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - |
      COMMIT_MSG="ci(build): ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}

${MR_DESCRIPTION}

Source: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
      printf "%s\n" "$COMMIT_MSG" > build_commit_message.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_commit_message.txt
    expire_in: 1 day

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_meta
      optional: true
    - job: build
      optional: true
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - |
      MR_TITLE_SAFE="${MR_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}}"
      MR_TITLE_SLUG_SAFE="${MR_TITLE_SLUG:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}}"
      DEPLOY_TAG="deploy/${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-env}/${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${MR_TITLE_SLUG_SAFE}"
      echo "Deployment notification:"
      echo "  env=${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-}"
      echo "  tag=${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      echo "  mr_title=${MR_TITLE_SAFE}"
      echo "  mr_url=${MR_WEB_URL:-}"
      echo "  pipeline=${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
    - |
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.local"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git tag -a "${DEPLOY_TAG}" -m "Deploy: ${MR_TITLE_SAFE}

${MR_DESCRIPTION:-}

MR: ${MR_WEB_URL:-}
Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
    - git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" --tags
  environment:
    name: production

release_notes:
  stage: release_notes
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_meta
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      {
        echo "## Release Notes"
        echo
        echo "- Project: ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}"
        echo "- Ref: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
        echo "- Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
        if [ -n "${MR_TITLE:-}" ]; then
          echo "- Merge Request: !${MR_IID:-} ${MR_TITLE}"
          if [ -n "${MR_WEB_URL:-}" ]; then
            echo "  - URL: ${MR_WEB_URL}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-}" ]; then
            echo
            echo "### Description"
            echo "${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
          fi
        else
          echo "- Merge Request: (not available in this pipeline context)"
        fi
        echo
      } > RELEASE_NOTES.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - RELEASE_NOTES.md
    expire_in: 30 days
